title: seleniazomai #4583
definition:
1) to be moon-struck or lunatic
 2) to be epileptic
   2a) epilepsy being supposed to return and increase with the
       increase of the moon. This meaning is doubtful as the
       Greeks knew nothing of epilepsy.
